Title: Cart Quantity Update Delay
Steps To Reproduce: 1. Search for product 'thermos' 2. Click on first result 3. Add to cart 4. Navigate to cart page 5. Click '+' button to increase quantity
Expected Result: Total price updates immediately to reflect new quantity (from $35.00 to $70.00)
Actual Result: Total price updates after 1-2 second delay. User may think action failed.

Title: No Default Shipping Method
Steps To Reproduce: 1. Add product to cart 2. Navigate to cart 3. Observe shipping section
Expected Result: Shipping method should be pre-selected or default applied
Actual Result: Shipping section shows 'Select shipping method' with no default option. User must manually select.

Title: Missing Quantity Update Feedback
Steps To Reproduce: 1. Add product to cart 2. View cart 3. Click '+' button to increase quantity
Expected Result: Visual loading indicator or confirmation message should appear
Actual Result: No visual feedback provided. Page updates without indication.
